---
title: ""
format: html
---

<!-- Container 1: Header is the Quarto navbar/logo automatically -->

<!-- Container 3: Mission -->
<div class="container mission">
  <img class="toucan" src="images/toucan.png" alt="Secondary Lab Logo">
  <div class="mission-text">
    <h2>Our Mission</h2>
    <p>Short text about the lab mission goes here…</p>
  </div>
  <img class="mission-image" src="images/mission.jpg" alt="Mission Image">
</div>

<!-- Container 4: Latest News -->
<div class="container news">
  <div class="news-text">
    <h2>Latest Lab News</h2>
    <p>Some news text here…</p>
  </div>
  <img class="news-image" src="images/news.jpg" alt="News Image">
</div>

<!-- Container 5: Projects -->
<div class="container projects">
  <div class="project">
    <h3>Project 1</h3>
    <p>Short project description…</p>
    <img src="images/project1.jpg" alt="Project 1 Image">
  </div>
  <div class="project">
    <h3>Project 2</h3>
    <p>Short project description…</p>
    <img src="images/project2.jpg" alt="Project 2 Image">
  </div>
  <div class="project">
    <h3>Project 3</h3>
    <p>Short project description…</p>
    <img src="images/project3.jpg" alt="Project 3 Image">
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Container 6: Footer -->
<footer class="footer">
  <div class="footer-left">
    <p>123 Science Drive, University of Wyoming, Laramie WY</p>
  </div>
  <div class="footer-right">
    <p>Copyright 2025 Behavioral Complexity Lab (created by hand with HTML5, CSS, and Quarto)</p>
  </div>
</footer>
